summary.description: High-level summary of the cross-project change

name.description: Project identifier matching a name in workspace.json

description.description: Self-contained work description for this project's pipeline

acceptance_criteria.description: Criteria the project's changes must satisfy

depends_on.description: Project names that must complete before this project starts

skip.description: true if this project needs no changes for this feature

integration_expectations.description: What the cross-project integration test should validate
